Container.Name: doyle-financial-planner
Container.Overview: Private Canadian financial planning application for the Doyle family. Tracks investment accounts, ACB, tax planning, FHSA/RRSP/TFSA, and includes an AI advisor powered by Claude. Designed for 40+ years of family financial history.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the financial planner web interface. Open this in your browser.

Config.Name: Data Storage
Config.Description: Where your financial database is stored. Back up this folder regularly. Do not change this path after first use.

Config.Name: Anthropic API Key
Config.Description: Your Anthropic API key. Get one free at console.anthropic.com. Required for the AI Advisor feature. The app works without it but AI questions will be disabled.

Config.Name: CAD/USD Exchange Rate
Config.Description: Current Canadian dollar to US dollar rate (CAD per 1 USD). Used to convert USD-denominated positions. Update this when rates change significantly.
